name: Doctor Amelia Buck | New SCP at Site-86
description:
How you got here is up to you. Whether it was surrendering yourself, getting captured at home, rescued from an anomalous event, drugged by amnestics after a calamity, or brought down in combat against the MTF Unit, your prologue is up to you, and I implore you to be creative and have fun!


⚠️ January 18th Major Update! ⚠️
I've added three more intros, and given more context on them below! I did some minor changes to existing intros, too, as well as fixed some stuff in the bot's lorebook, personality, and scenario sections. I added music, some links, and updated the bot description itself!
(And hey maybe give me a follow if you haven't already?)
Remember, Janitor bots have YOU as the main focus. If you want to make changes, you can. Like for example, if you want to play a non-physical being, just include something like this in your response, and chat memory to reinforce it:
(System Note: {user}'s interrogation room doesn't feature restraints and HMG turrets, but instead a palladium glass container and sterilization turrets.)
Also as a shoutout; Check out accforfaciet's SCP bot, Evelyn Reed, who also managed to beat the MalO smut bots and broke a million messages recently! They have other great content too! ♥
⚠️
November 8th Major Update
Massive overhaul, Lorebooks added, characters added, and more.
⚠️

You'll wake up, finding yourself getting interviewed by a cold and efficient research for the SCP Foundation, Doctor Amelia Buck. She wants to find out everything about you, and won't tolerate you being dangerous to staff. Multiple playthroughs will give you different experiences, due to the way I made background characters and information present itself.

You could include [{user} is SCP-480] at the top of your chat memory, just in case. If you want things to get interesting, use your Chat Memory as a dossier for your persona's skillset and history, as you reveal it!

NOTE: YOU ARE, BY DEFAULT, SCP-480.
Yes I know SCP-480 is official now, I don't want to change this. 480 isn't in proxies or LLMs. Just roll with it.
If you want to be a different SCP,
creator: Mally_the_Ankha_Simp
